error_signature: The connection was aborted, perhaps the server is offline
title: HTTP Request node connection aborted
symptom: When executing an HTTP Request node, the error 'The connection was aborted, perhaps the server is offline' appears, indicating a failure to connect to the specified URL.
applies_when: The specified URL is incorrect or unreachable
not_this_if: The URL is valid and reachable
The server is confirmed to be online
root_cause: This error occurs when the HTTP Request node attempts to connect to a URL that does not exist or is unreachable. This can happen due to incorrect URL formatting or the server being down, even if it appears to be functioning.
fix_steps: Check the URL in the HTTP Request node configuration for accuracy
Ensure the server is online and accessible
Test the URL in a web browser to confirm it is reachable
agent_instruction: Verify and correct the URL in the HTTP Request node settings.
